risk_title: Project suspension due to extraordinary political situation in Afghanistan
risk_summary: The Afghanistan Reconstruction Trust Fund (ARTF) financing for the project has been canceled, and IDA grants remain suspended due to the current extraordinary situation in the country, preventing effective project implementation.
evidence_quote: The Afghanistan Reconstruction Trust Fund (ARTF) in the project was canceled based on the consideration that the project cannot be effectively implemented under the current extraordinary situation in Afghanistan. Undisbursed IDA grants under this project will remain suspended until a decision is made by the World Bank.

risk_title: Political and governance instability affecting project implementation
risk_summary: Political and governance risks are rated as High and persistent, directly constraining the project's ability to execute planned activities and achieve development objectives.
evidence_quote: Risk Category: Political and Governance - Rating at Approval: High, Previous Rating: High, Current Rating: High

risk_title: Uncertainty over project activities halting implementation progress
risk_summary: Uncertainty regarding project activities in the current Afghanistan context has caused implementation delays and stalled progress on key components, with no relevant activities initiated.
evidence_quote: Progress is behind schedule, partly due to COVID-19 and uncertainty over project activities.

risk_summary: Sector strategies and policies risks remain rated as High, indicating fundamental instability in the policy environment necessary for digital payments and financial system integration.
evidence_quote: Risk Category: Sector Strategies and Policies - Rating at Approval: High, Previous Rating: High, Current Rating: High
